screen.title: Autonomous Mode
screen.subtitle: Set up Claude to work independently while you're away.
screen.detail: Loops, monitors, batch ops, and custom automation -- all with safety guards.

choices.label: Monitor & Maintain
choices.description: Watch CI, fix builds, prune PRs, guard tests

choices.label: Background Coding
choices.description: Implement features, fix bugs, update docs unattended

choices.label: Batch Operations
choices.description: Large-scale migrations, refactors, dependency updates

choices.label: Custom Loop
choices.description: Define your own recurring automation

choices.label: PR Babysitter
choices.description: Review, rebase, and shepherd PRs to merge (every 5 min)

choices.label: Build Shepherd
choices.description: Watch CI, auto-fix build failures (every 5 min)

choices.label: Test Guardian
choices.description: Run tests, auto-fix flaky tests (every 15 min)

choices.label: PR Pruner
choices.description: Close stale PRs with no activity >7 days (every hour)

choices.label: Dependency Watcher
choices.description: Check for security advisories (every 10 min)

choices.label: Cost Monitor
choices.description: Alert if API costs exceed thresholds (every 30 min)

choices.label: Implement from spec
choices.description: Build a feature from a spec file autonomously
choices.context: Implement the feature described in the spec. Work autonomously:

choices.label: Post-merge sweep
choices.description: Fix unresolved review comments after merge

choices.label: Doc Updater
choices.description: Scan code changes, update documentation (every hour)

choices.label: Knowledge Compounder
choices.description: Extract patterns from sessions into reusable knowledge (every 2h)

choices.label: Slack Feedback Collector
choices.description: Create PRs from Slack feedback messages (every 30 min)

choices.label: CJS to ESM migration
choices.description: Convert CommonJS to ES Modules across the codebase

choices.label: React class to hooks
choices.description: Convert class components to function components with hooks

choices.label: Multi-file rename
choices.description: Rename a symbol across the entire codebase

choices.label: Dependency upgrade
choices.description: Major version bump across all packages

choices.label: Linter rule enforcement
choices.description: Apply a new lint rule project-wide

custom-loop.prompt: Describe your custom loop (what + how often):
custom-loop.context: Set up a custom autonomous loop:
